name: Jiangsu Zhongshe Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Zhongshe Group Co., Ltd. operates as an engineering consulting company in China. It offers planning, design, consultation, supervision, inspection, surveying, testing, project management, bidding, engineering general contracting, and other services in the fields of transportation, municipal administration, construction, and environment. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Wuxi, China.
